reasons: Deflated Sharpe is 0.81 (< 0.95): after correcting for 16 trial(s) and fat tails, the edge is not convincingly positive.
PBO is 0.51 (>= 0.50): the in-sample best configuration is no better than a coin flip out of sample.
Bootstrap P(SR<=0) is 0.00: the Sharpe stays positive across resamples (selection-blind: a cherry-picked curve can still look good here).
100% of walk-forward folds are positive: performance is reasonably stable across time (selection-blind).

description: Dual SMA crossover, long-only, hold to reversal (the survivor baseline).
